summary: Full E2E testing of VenuLoQ Customer Interface Phase 2 completed. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages and navigation working correctly. Recommended for You section displays personalized venues based on user preferences (Delhi/Mumbai, Wedding). Minor UI issue: Star rating in Write Review modal requires proper React state interaction.

customer_login.detail: Login via /auth page with democustomer@venulock.in works correctly

dashboard_welcome.detail: Dashboard shows welcome header with user name, stats (4 enquiries, 0 saved, 0 viewed)

dashboard_quick_actions.detail: All 7 quick action buttons navigate correctly: Browse Venues, My Bookings, My Reviews, Payments, Invoices, Favorites, Profile

recommended_venues_api.detail: GET /api/auth/recommended-venues returns 20 venues with has_preferences=true, matching Delhi/Mumbai cities

recommended_venues_ui.detail: Dashboard shows 8 recommended venue cards with images, ratings, MATCH labels, pricing info

recommended_venue_navigation.detail: Clicking recommended venue navigates to venue detail page (e.g., /venues/delhi/iskcon-dwarka)

my_bookings_api.detail: GET /api/auth/my-bookings returns 4 bookings with status_label, status_color, stage, venues array

my_bookings_ui.detail: My Bookings page shows filter chips (All/Active/Completed), booking cards with venue images, status badges, progress bars

booking_timeline.detail: Booking timeline expands on click showing 8 stages: Enquiry Received, Expert Assigned, Site Visit, Negotiation, Date Locked, Deposit Made, Final Checks, Event Complete

my_reviews_api.detail: GET /api/auth/my-reviews returns reviews with venue_name, venue_image enrichment

my_reviews_ui.detail: My Reviews page shows stats (2 reviews, 4.5 avg rating), review cards with venue info

write_review_modal.detail: Write Review modal opens with venue selection (2 venues from bookings), star rating, title, content fields

create_review_api.detail: POST /api/venues/{venue_id}/reviews creates review and returns review_id

payments_api.detail: GET /api/auth/my-payments returns payments (0 for test customer)

payments_ui.detail: Payments page shows Total Paid summary (₹0), empty state message

invoices_api.detail: GET /api/auth/my-invoices returns invoices (0 for test customer)

invoices_ui.detail: Invoices page shows empty state message

profile_preferences.detail: Profile page shows saved preferences: Delhi, Mumbai (cities), Wedding (event type), 1L-3L (budget range)

protected_routes.detail: All 5 new endpoints return 401 without authentication

back_navigation.detail: All sub-pages have back navigation to /my-enquiries dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Recommended venues endpoint uses preference matching with relevance scoring
Status tracking with STAGE_MAP provides good UX for booking progress
Write Review modal correctly fetches venues from bookings for selection
seed_data_creation: Created test reviews via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Customer Interface fully tested including new Recommended for You feature. Customer has preferences: preferred_cities=['Delhi','Mumbai'], preferred_event_types=['Wedding'], budget_range='1L-3L'. The recommended-venues endpoint returns ~20 matching venues sorted by relevance. Customer has 4 bookings (leads), 2+ reviews, 0 payments, 0 invoices. All pages accessible from dashboard quick actions. My Bookings shows timeline with 8 stages. My Reviews has Write Review modal with venue selection from bookings. Payments and Invoices show empty states.

mocked_apis.note: Razorpay is in test mode but no payment testing was done
